intent: Stop Codex Auto Fix local runner/codex-fix runs from stale-blocking or recursively hanging on pull_request_review review events.
assumptions: Same-PR review events must remain serialized.
Different PRs must not share a default-branch/actor concurrency group.
CODEX_AGENT_COMMAND must point to the real Codex CLI executor, not codex-auto-fix itself.
Existing job, step, agent, and CLI budget timeouts remain valid.
risks: Canceling active runs can interrupt publish or state-machine advancement.
github.ref based concurrency can stale-block unrelated PRs.
Recursive CODEX_AGENT_COMMAND configuration looks like a hung runner unless preflight blocks it.
implementation: Use PR-number workflow concurrency with cancel-in-progress false.
Warn from doctor when CODEX_AGENT_COMMAND points to codex-auto-fix.
Add workflow_state and doctor regression tests.
